new_finding_this_run.detail: COMPOUNDING PENALTY ANALYSIS: On restart, two active rules stack their penalties on incoming signals. (1) streak_gate fires -15pts due to 4 consecutive losses at shutdown. (2) conf_floor_70_v1 fires -20pts for signals in 60-70% band. SIMULATION: 80% signal -> streak_gate -> 65% -> conf_floor_70_v1 triggers (65 in [60,70]) -> -20pts -> 45% BLOCKED. 85% -> 70% -> blocked. 90% -> 75% -> PASSES. RESULT: Only signals at raw confidence >=90% survive both filters. ETH/BTC trending signals (morning edge) typically arrive at 70-85% confidence. RISK: ZERO trades may fire at 06:00 UTC restart even in the highest-edge morning window.
new_finding_this_run.minimum_signal_to_trade: 90% raw confidence (very rare for trending setups)
new_finding_this_run.recommendation: HUMAN DECISION REQUIRED before 06:00 UTC (T-3.82h): Suspend conf_floor_70_v1 for soft-start period (first 5 trades). Evidence: (a) 2 applications, 0 correct. (b) Insight journal shows 60-70% = +$2.19/trade EV on 67 trades. (c) Compounding with streak_gate creates effective shutdown. Action: Set conf_floor_70_v1.active=False OR reduce adjustment from -20 to -5 for first 5 trades. Reactivate after streak resets (1 winning trade).
